title: Section 10
content: 1[10. [Release on probation of good conduct or after due admonition.] Omitted by the Suppression of Immoral Traffic in Women and Girls (Amendment) Act, 1986 (44 of 1986), s. 13 (w.e.f. 26-1-1987).
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 46 of 1978, s. 7, for section 10 (w.e.f. 2-10-1979).
